stemHtml:
For the upcoming commercial flight from London to Rome, the aircraft has a crew of 7 members and 115 passengers. To calculate the Traffic Load as part of the pre-flight calculations, we have the following information:

Flight crew: 4 male & 3 female
Male passengers: 70
Female passengers: 35
Children: 10
Baggage: 62 items
Standard mass for baggage: 13 kg
Standard mass for male: 88 kg
Standard mass for female: 70 kg
Standard mass for children: 35 kg
Standard mass for a flight crew member: 85 kg
Non-revenue load: 500 kg

Please use this information to calculate the Traffic Load.
